name: CrowdStrike Falcon — AI client process activity
description: CrowdStrike Falcon Custom IOA detection for execution and DNS resolution patterns of consumer AI clients on managed endpoints.
rule_explanation: Endpoint-side coverage for environments where Microsoft tooling isn't dominant. Falcon Custom IOAs are evaluated at the agent and surface in Falcon Insight events.
required_data_sources: CrowdStrike Falcon Insight (XDR) or Falcon Prevent with telemetry
prerequisites: Custom IOA rule group created (Admin > Custom IOAs)
Sensor at version that supports DNS_LOOKUP and PROCESS_EXEC IOA triggers
expected_volume: Variable by org. Use Informational severity by default.
false_positive_guidance: Allow-list approved-pilot users via sensor grouping.
tuning_steps: Add new AI desktop clients as released.
Correlate with Falcon Identity Protection events for OAuth grants where applicable.
author: Emmanuel Guilherme Jr.
